economic_mechanism: Gradual information diffusion and trend-following demand may sustain ten-session continuation after a completed close at least 2% above the prior completed 20-session high while above a fully warmed prior-completed SMA100.
candidate_or_family_scope: MULTINAME_BREAKOUT_BULL_CALL_14D_V1 / TIME_SERIES_20D_BREAKOUT_CONTINUATION on the frozen AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, AMZN, META, GOOGL, AMD, and TSLA adjusted-close panel; next-session entry; prior-only same-symbol controls; non-overlapping pair windows; chronological 168/113 development/holdout split; future one-lot 14-DTE $1-wide bull-call debit spread remains structural only with capital_fit_usd=100, max_loss_usd=100 before closing friction, and max_lots=1.
falsifier: On the exact final 40% frozen partition: fewer than 80 pairs or six symbols; non-positive treated mean after the same labeled symmetric 20-bps underlying sensitivity; non-positive paired excess mean; non-positive one-sided 90% circular five-pair-block bootstrap lower bound; changed source/population/train-prefix identity; or any chronology, control-reuse, overlap, match-bound, finite-value, or strict-JSON violation.

strategy_advancement.summary: The frozen 113-pair holdout passed all six unchanged pooled discovery gates: treated +2.2298%, control -1.4955%, paired excess +3.7254%, LB90 +1.8624%, eight-symbol breadth, and zero integrity violations. The candidate advanced only F1_TRAIN to F2_UNTOUCHED_HOLDOUT under L0; pricing_calls remains zero and no L1, capital-seat, paper, shadow, or live authority followed.

search_information.summary: The wake closed the active epoch's one-shot evidence decision, added fail-closed source/population/overwrite machinery, separated F2 funnel progress from L1 authority, and froze claim-aligned downstream option constraints while retaining heterogeneous symbol/time diagnostics as mandatory non-gating context.

useful_deltas.summary: Advanced the exact pooled breakout-continuation candidate from F1 to F2/L0 on 113 reserved pairs while preserving zero option or capital authority and explicit one-lot structural bounds.

Repaired the overloaded F2-or-L1 label and encoded the challenger-required development-only option freeze, absolute after-cost PnL/path-risk objective, ten-session primary stop, dual cost axes, listing fail-close, and concentration diagnostics as tested runner output.

Closed the active epoch at F2/L0 and barred relabeling the opened 113 rows as a newly untouched option holdout; downstream DNA must freeze on the original 168 development rows and use the 113 only as inspected secondary stress.

critic_findings.finding: N1: f2_or_l1_claim conflated F2 funnel progress with L1 authority.
critic_findings.rationale: Future payloads now emit separate funnel_claim_f2 and l1_claim fields, strip an inherited legacy flag, and retain the independent fail-closed authority block. The immutable one-shot cache was not rewritten; its tracked summary explicitly supersedes the legacy label.

critic_findings.finding: N2: the next option stage must optimize absolute after-cost option PnL and path risk rather than rely on control underperformance or underlying paired excess.
critic_findings.rationale: The runner now emits primary_metric=absolute_after_cost_option_pnl_and_path_risk and paired_underlying_excess_can_rescue_failure=false; tests assert both boundaries and the merged NEXT uses the same reject-unless semantics.

critic_findings.finding: N3: option payoff work must remain aligned to the measured ten-session horizon, fail closed on missing listings, and report symbol/time concentration.
critic_findings.rationale: The runner now freezes a hard ten-session primary stop, marks hold-to-expiry non-primary, requires listed-expiry/strike availability, fails closed on missing listings, and requires symbol/time concentration; focused tests assert these constraints.

critic_findings.finding: N4: search_epoch.json rounded paired-excess and LB90 values differently from the canonical summary.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a strategy or implementation defect, but accepted as a truth-surface cleanup: the config is now pinned to the exact canonical summary values 0.03725361396111984 and 0.018623657692392246, and the finalizer consistency command proved exact equality plus canonical SHA/size.

critic_findings.finding: N5: finalization required the full repository suite, not only focused tests.
critic_findings.rationale: This was a verification requirement rather than an executor code defect. Finalization ran 36 focused/adjacent tests and the full 319-test unittest suite; both returned OK.

critic_findings.finding: N6: the new validator capability must not be reported as strategy advancement by itself.
critic_findings.rationale: No capability-only advancement claim remains. Strategy advancement is tied to the frozen 113-pair experiment; validator and label repairs are separately recorded as search-information and repair deltas.

critic_findings.finding: Weak AMZN/META slices, thin MSFT support, and a weak early chronological tertile should narrow the claim.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected only as a reason to mutate or retroactively fail the predeclared pooled gate. Accepted as mandatory scope limitation: durable surfaces make no universal-by-symbol or temporal-uniformity claim and require concentration reporting in the next option stage.

data_dependencies: Frozen adjusted-close source files and exact 281-blueprint population remain the historical F2 evidence base.
A claim-aligned option specification must be frozen on only the original 168 development rows before any use of the opened 113 rows as secondary stress.
Fresh live-clock paper and claim-appropriate option/fill evidence remain required before F4 or any higher authority.
next: BREAKOUT_F2_OPTION_PAYOFF_FREEZE: freeze one exact listed-expiry/strike/debit/management 14-DTE $1-wide bull-call specification on only the original 168 development rows; require non-vacuous positive absolute after-cost option PnL under adverse fixed-dollar and percentage multi-leg costs, one-lot max loss <=$300, window max DD <=$75, listing availability, symbol/time concentration, a hard 10-session primary stop, and no same-bar reentry; use the opened 113 only as labeled secondary stress without retuning; keep evidence L0/no L1 and require fresh live-clock paper before F4.
